caption: Figure 3. The ratio NLL/(NLH + NHL) as a function of W for the cases m = 2 (light gray) and m = 3 (dark gray) [4].
description: A bar chart showing the ratio NLL/(NLH + NHL) for different values of W ranging from 1 to 30, comparing two cases: m=2 (represented by light gray bars) and m=3 (represented by dark gray bars).
